monday.description: Pan-seared John Dory served with wild rice, roasted parsnips, and a drizzle of reduced-sodium pomodoro sauce.

tuesday.description: Slow-cooked free-range beef cheek paired with cavatelli pasta, sautéed spring onions, and a rich double cream sauce.

wednesday.description: Braised free-range lamb shank served with quick-cook ponni rice, steamed kohlrabi, and a side of reduced-sodium espagnole sauce.

thursday.description: Grilled lamb loin served with whole grain quick oats, roasted bell peppers, and a spicy kick from pickled jalapenos.

friday.description: Pan-seared spatchcock chicken paired with cheese ravioli, roasted acorn squash, and a drizzle of grapeseed oil.

monday.description: Requeson cheese baked with gluten-free ziti pasta, roasted kabocha squash, and a sprinkle of peppermint.

tuesday.description: Scrambled large brown eggs mixed with jasmine rice, sautéed morel mushrooms, and a splash of reduced-sodium mirin.

wednesday.description: Steamed green peas served with gluten-free shirataki noodles, roasted serrano peppers, and a creamy blue cheese dressing.

thursday.description: Roasted pecan halves paired with gluten-free pastina pasta, steamed bamboo shoots, and a warm star anise spice.

friday.description: Canned green lentils cooked with trenette pasta, roasted red onions, and a rich organic double cream sauce.
